# neuroim2

# neuroim2

Data structures and I/O for volumetric brain imaging with a focus on
fMRI. This is the successor to
[`neuroim`](https://github.com/bbuchsbaum/neuroim) with improved S4
classes, sparse/dense 3D–4D representations, and fast
resampling/filtering.

**Website:** <https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/> **CRAN:**
<https://cran.r-project.org/package=neuroim2>

## Key Features

- **NIfTI / AFNI support** — read and write `.nii`, `.nii.gz`, and AFNI
  `.BRIK`/`.HEAD` files
- **S4 class hierarchy** — `NeuroVol` (3D volumes) and `NeuroVec` (4D
  time-series) with dense, sparse, memory-mapped, and clustered variants
- **Coordinate systems** — full affine-aware transforms between voxel,
  grid, and world coordinates
- **Searchlights & ROIs** — spherical, cuboid, and random searchlight
  iterators plus flexible ROI construction
- **Spatial filtering** — Gaussian blur, guided filter, bilateral
  filter, and connected-component labelling
- **Resampling** — volume-to-volume resampling with configurable
  interpolation
- **Visualization** — slice montages, orthographic views, and overlay
  plotting via ggplot2

## Installation

### CRAN

``` r
install.packages("neuroim2")
```

### R-universe (daily builds)

``` r
install.packages("neuroim2",
  repos = c("https://bbuchsbaum.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
```

### Development version (GitHub)

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("bbuchsbaum/neuroim2")
```

## Usage

Read a NIFTI image and perform simple operations:

``` r
library(neuroim2)
fname <- system.file("extdata", "global_mask_v4.nii", package="neuroim2")
vol <- read_vol(fname)

v1 <- vol[1,1,1]
vol2 <- vol + vol
all(vol == (vol2 - vol))
```

``` R
## [1] TRUE
```

Create a 4D image from volumes:

``` r
vec <- vec_from_vols(list(vol, vol, vol2))
series1 <- vec[1,1,1,]
length(series1)
```

``` R
## [1] 3
```

## Vignettes

Browse the full set of
[articles](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/index.html) on
the pkgdown site:

| Getting Started                                                                              | Analysis Workflows                                                                             | Advanced                                                                                     |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [Overview](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Overview.html)                     | [Analysis Workflows](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/AnalysisWorkflows.html)    | [Image Volumes](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/ImageVolumes.html)            |
| [Choosing Backends](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/ChoosingBackends.html)    | [Slice Visualization](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/slice-visualization.html) | [NeuroVector](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/NeuroVector.html)               |
| [Coordinate Systems](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/coordinate-systems.html) | [Cookbook](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Cookbook.html)                       | [Regions of Interest](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/regionOfInterest.html)  |
| [Volumes & Vectors](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/VolumesAndVectors.html)   | [Smoothing](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Smoothing.html)                     | [Clustered NeuroVec](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/clustered-neurovec.html) |
| [Resampling](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Resampling.html)                 |                                                                                                | [Pipelines](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/pipelines.html)                   |

## Albers theme

This package uses the albersdown theme. Existing vignette theme hooks
are replaced so `albers.css` and local `albers.js` render consistently
on CRAN and GitHub Pages. The defaults are configured via
`params$family` and `params$preset` (family = ‘red’, preset = ‘homage’).
The pkgdown site uses `template: { package: albersdown }`.

# Package index

## Visualization Helpers

Plotting utilities for slices, montages, overlays, and palettes

- [`theme_neuro()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/theme_neuro.md)
  : A minimal, publication-friendly theme for image slices
- [`resolve_cmap()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resolve_cmap.md)
  : Neuroimaging color palettes and helpers
- [`scale_fill_neuro()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/scale_fill_neuro.md)
  : A ggplot2 fill scale with neuroimaging-friendly defaults
- [`annotate_orientation()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/annotate_orientation.md)
  : Add L/R and A/P/S/I annotations (optional)
- [`plot_montage()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/plot_montage.md)
  : Plot a montage of axial (or any-plane) slices using facetting
- [`plot_ortho()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/plot_ortho.md)
  : Orthogonal three-plane view with optional crosshairs
- [`plot_overlay()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/plot_overlay.md)
  : Composite an overlay map on a structural background
- [`mapToColors()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/mapToColors.md)
  : Map intensity values to colors

  : FileSource Class

  : MappedNeuroVecSource Class

  : NamedAxis

  : NeuroSlice Class

  : NeuroSpace Class

  : SparseNeuroVecSource Class

  : Pre-defined 2D orientation configurations
- [`OrientationList3D`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/OrientationList3D.md)
  : Pre-defined 3D orientation configurations

## Data Loading and Manipulation

Methods for loading and manipulating neuroimaging data

- [`concat()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/concat-methods.md)
  : Concatenate two objects in the time dimension

- [`mapf()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/map-methods.md)
  : Apply a function to an object.

- [`vols()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/vols-methods.md)
  : Extract an ordered series of 3D volumes.

- [`vec_from_vols()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/vec_from_vols.md)
  : Create NeuroVec from list of NeuroVol objects

- [`neuroim2-package`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/neuroim2-package.md)
  [`neuroim2`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/neuroim2-package.md)
  : neuroim2: neuroimaging data structures for analysis

- [`data_file()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/data_file-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to get the name of the data file, given a file name
  and a `FileFormat` instance.

- [`data_file_matches()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/data_file_matches-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to test whether a file name conforms to the given a
  `FileFormat` instance. Will test for match to data file only

- [`data_reader()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/data_reader.md)
  : Create a Data Reader

- [`file_matches()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/file_matches-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to test whether a file name conforms to the given
  `FileFormat` instance. Will test for match to either header file or
  data file

- [`read_elements()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_elements-methods.md)
  : Read a sequence of elements from an input source

- [`createNIfTIHeader()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/createNIfTIHeader.md)
  : Create an Empty NIfTI-1 Header List

- [`linear_access()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/linear_access.md)
  : Extract values from an array-like object using linear indexing.

- [`image`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/image.md) :
  Generic Image Method for Creating Visual Representations

- [`scale()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/scale.md)
  : Generic Scale Method

- [`simulate_fmri()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/simulate_fmri.md)
  : Simulate fMRI Data

## Coordinate and Dimension Operations

Methods for operating on coordinates and dimensions

- [`space()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/space-methods.md)
  : Extract Geometric Properties of an Image

- [`axes()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/axes-methods.md)
  : Extract Image Axes

- [`spacing()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/spacing-methods.md)
  : Extract Voxel Dimensions of an Image

- [`bounds()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/bounds-methods.md)
  : Extract Spatial Bounds of an Image

- [`centroid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/centroid-methods.md)
  : return the centroid of an object

- [`coord_to_grid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/coord_to_grid-methods.md)
  : convert n-dimensional real world coordinates to grid coordinates

- [`coord_to_index()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/coord_to_index-methods.md)
  : convert n-dimensional real world coordinates to 1D indices

- [`grid_to_coord()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/grid_to_coord-methods.md)
  : Generic function to convert N-dimensional grid coordinates to real
  world coordinates

- [`grid_to_index()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/grid_to_index-methods.md)
  : Generic function to convert N-dimensional grid coordinates to 1D
  indices

- [`grid_to_grid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/grid_to_grid-methods.md)
  : Generic function to convert voxel coordinates in the reference space
  (LPI) to native array space.

- [`index_to_coord()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/index_to_coord-methods.md)
  : convert 1d indices to n-dimensional real world coordinates

- [`index_to_grid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/index_to_grid-methods.md)
  : Convert 1d indices to n-dimensional grid coordinates

- [`dim_of()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim_of-methods.md)
  : Get the length of a given dimension of an object

- [`drop_dim()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/drop_dim-methods.md)
  : Drop a Dimension from an Object

- [`add_dim()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/add_dim-methods.md)
  : Add a Dimension to an Object

- [`ndim()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/ndim-methods.md)
  : Extract the number of dimensions of an object

- [`voxels()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/voxels-methods.md)
  : extract voxel coordinates

- [`which_dim()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/which_dim-methods.md)
  : Find Dimensions of a Given Axis

- [`trans()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/trans-methods.md)
  : Extract image coordinate transformation

- [`inverse_trans()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/inverse_trans-methods.md)
  : Extract inverse image coordinate transformation

- [`origin()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/origin-methods.md)
  : Extract Image Origin

- [`perm_mat()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/perm_mat-methods.md)
  : Extract permutation matrix associated with an image

- [`strip_extension()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/strip_extension-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to strip extension from file name, given a
  `FileFormat` instance.

- [`deoblique()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/deoblique.md)
  : Deoblique a Neuroimaging Space or Volume

- [`LEFT_RIGHT`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/anatomical_axes.md)
  [`RIGHT_LEFT`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/anatomical_axes.md)
  [`ANT_POST`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/anatomical_axes.md)
  [`POST_ANT`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/anatomical_axes.md)
  [`INF_SUP`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/anatomical_axes.md)
  [`SUP_INF`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/anatomical_axes.md)
  : Pre-defined anatomical axes

- [`TIME`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/TIME.md) :
  Time axis

- [`findAnatomy3D()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/findAnatomy3D.md)
  : Find 3D anatomical orientation from axis abbreviations

- [`matrixToQuatern()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/matrixToQuatern.md)
  : Convert a Transformation Matrix to a Quaternion Representation

- [`quaternToMatrix()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/quaternToMatrix.md)
  : Convert Quaternion Parameters to a Transformation Matrix

- [`apply_affine()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  [`to_matvec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  [`from_matvec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  [`append_diag()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  [`dot_reduce()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  [`voxel_sizes()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  [`obliquity()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  [`rescale_affine()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/affine_utils.md)
  : Affine utility functions

- [`affine_to_orientation()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/orientation_utils.md)
  [`orientation_transform()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/orientation_utils.md)
  [`apply_orientation()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/orientation_utils.md)
  [`orientation_inverse_affine()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/orientation_utils.md)
  [`orientation_to_axcodes()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/orientation_utils.md)
  [`axcodes_to_orientation()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/orientation_utils.md)
  [`affine_to_axcodes()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/orientation_utils.md)
  : Orientation utility functions

- [`output_aligned_space()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/space_utils.md)
  [`vox2out_vox()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/space_utils.md)
  [`slice_to_volume_affine()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/space_utils.md)
  [`slice2volume()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/space_utils.md)
  : Space utility functions

## ROI and Clustering

Methods for working with regions of interest and clustering

- [`partition()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/partition-methods.md)
  : Partition an image into a set of disjoint clusters
- [`patch_set()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/patch_set.md)
  : Generate a set of coordinate "patches" of fixed size from an image
  object.
- [`split_clusters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_clusters-methods.md)
  : Cut an object into a list of spatial or spatiotemporal clusters
- [`centroids()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/centroids-methods.md)
  : Return a matrix of centroids of an object
- [`conn_comp()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/conn_comp-methods.md)
  : Connected components
- [`conn_comp_3D()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/conn_comp_3D.md)
  : Extract Connected Components from a 3D Binary Mask
- [`coords()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/coords.md)
  : Extract coordinates from an object
- [`cuboid_roi()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/cuboid_roi.md)
  : Create A Cuboid Region of Interest
- [`num_clusters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/num_clusters-methods.md)
  : Number of Clusters
- [`slices()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/slices-methods.md)
  : Extract an ordered series of 2D slices from a 3D or 4D object
- [`slice()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/slice-methods.md)
  : Extract image slice
- [`vectors()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/vectors-methods.md)
  : Extract an ordered list of 1D vectors.
- [`values()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/values-methods.md)
  : Extract Data Values of an Object
- [`spherical_roi_set()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/spherical_roi_set.md)
  : Create Multiple Spherical Regions of Interest

## Kernel and Extraction

Methods for kernel operations and feature extraction

- [`Kernel()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/Kernel.md)
  : Create a Kernel object from a function of distance from kernel
  center

- [`Kernel-class`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/Kernel-class.md)
  : Kernel

- [`embed_kernel()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/embed_kernel-methods.md)
  : Generic function to position kernel in a position in image space

- [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike3D>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor3d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike3D>`*`,`*`<matrix>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor3d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike3D>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor3d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike3D>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor3d.md)
  : Array-like access for 3-dimensional data structures

- [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike4D>`*`,`*`<matrix>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike4D>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike4D>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike4D>`*`,`*`<integer>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike4D>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ArrayLike4D>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ClusteredNeuroVec>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<ClusteredNeuroVec>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  : Array-like access for 4-dimensional data structures

- [`spherical_roi()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/spherical_roi.md)
  : Create a Spherical Region of Interest

- [`square_roi()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/square_roi.md)
  : Create a square region of interest

- [`searchlight()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/searchlight.md)
  : Create an exhaustive searchlight iterator

- [`searchlight_coords()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/searchlight_coords.md)
  : Create an exhaustive searchlight iterator for voxel coordinates
  using spherical_roi

- [`random_searchlight()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/random_searchlight.md)
  : Create a spherical random searchlight iterator

- [`resampled_searchlight()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resampled_searchlight.md)
  [`bootstrap_searchlight()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resampled_searchlight.md)
  : Create a resampled searchlight iterator

- [`ellipsoid_shape()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/searchlight_shape_functions.md)
  [`cube_shape()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/searchlight_shape_functions.md)
  [`blobby_shape()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/searchlight_shape_functions.md)
  :

  Convenience shape generators for
  [`resampled_searchlight()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resampled_searchlight.md)

- [`series_roi()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/series_roi.md)
  : Extract time series from specific voxel coordinates and return as
  ROI object

- [`gaussian_blur()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/gaussian_blur.md)
  : Gaussian Blur for Volumetric Images

- [`guided_filter()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/guided_filter.md)
  : Edge-Preserving Guided Filter for Volumetric Images

- [`bilateral_filter()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/bilateral_filter.md)
  : Apply a bilateral filter to a volumetric image

- [`bilateral_filter_4d()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/bilateral_filter_4d.md)
  : Apply a 4D bilateral filter to a NeuroVec

- [`cgb_filter()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/cgb_filter.md)
  : Correlation-guided bilateral filtering (convenience wrapper)

- [`cgb_make_graph()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/cgb_make_graph.md)
  : Build a correlation-guided bilateral (CGB) graph

- [`cgb_smooth()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/cgb_smooth.md)
  : Apply a precomputed CGB graph to volumetric data

- [`cgb_smooth_loro()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/cgb_smooth_loro.md)
  : Leave-one-run-out smoothing helper

- [`reorient()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/reorient-methods.md)
  : Remap the grid-to-world coordinates mapping of an image.

- [`clustered_searchlight()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/clustered_searchlight.md)
  : Create a clustered searchlight iterator

- [`cluster_searchlight_series()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/cluster_searchlight_series.md)
  : Cluster-centroid searchlight over cluster time-series

- [`spatial-filter`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/spatial-filter.md)
  : Spatial Filtering Methods for Neuroimaging Data

- [`searchlight-methods`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/searchlight-methods.md)
  : Searchlight Analysis Methods

- [`laplace_enhance()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/laplace_enhance.md)
  : Laplacian Enhancement Filter for Volumetric Images

## Lookup and Mapping

Methods for looking up and mapping neuroimaging data

- [`lookup()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/lookup.md)
  : Index Lookup operation
- [`map_values()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/map_values-methods.md)
  : Map Values from One Set to Another Using a User-supplied Lookup
  Table
- [`resample()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resample-methods.md)
  : Resample an Image to Match the Space of Another Image
- [`neuro-resample`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/neuro-resample.md)
  : Resampling Methods for Neuroimaging Objects

## Data Access and Indexing

Methods for accessing and indexing neuroimaging data

- [`sub_vector()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/sub_vector-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to extract a sub-vector from a `NeuroVec` object.

- [`indices()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/indices.md)
  : Extract indices

- [`length(`*`<ClusteredNeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)
  [`length(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)
  [`length(`*`<NeuroVecSeq>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)
  [`length(`*`<ROIVol>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)
  [`length(`*`<ROICoords>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)
  : Get length of NeuroVec object

- [`neuro-ops`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/neuro-ops.md)
  : Arithmetic and Comparison Operations for Neuroimaging Objects

## Scaling and Resampling

Methods for splitting, scaling, processing, and resampling neuroimaging
data

- [`scale_series()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/scale_series-methods.md)
  : Generic functions to scale (center and/or normalize by standard
  deviation) each series of a 4D image That is, if the 4th dimension is
  'time' each series is a 1D time series.
- [`make_time_weights()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/make_time_weights.md)
  : Build smooth time weights from motion/outlier metrics
- [`prepare_confounds()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/prepare_confounds.md)
  : Prepare weighted nuisance projectors for each run
- [`resample()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resample-methods.md)
  : Resample an Image to Match the Space of Another Image
- [`resample_to()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resample_to.md)
  : Resample an image with readable method names
- [`neuro-downsample`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/neuro-downsample.md)
  : Downsampling Methods for Neuroimaging Objects
- [`split_blocks()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_blocks-methods.md)
  : Cut a vector-valued object into a list of sub-blocks
- [`split_clusters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_clusters-methods.md)
  : Cut an object into a list of spatial or spatiotemporal clusters
- [`split_fill()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_fill-methods.md)
  : Fill Disjoint Sets of Values with the Output of a Function
- [`split_reduce()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_reduce-methods.md)
  : Summarize Subsets of an Object by Splitting by Row and Applying a
  Summary Function
- [`split_scale()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_scale-methods.md)
  : Center and/or Scale Row-subsets of a Matrix or Matrix-like Object

## IO

Methods for input-output operations

- [`read_vec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_vec.md)
  : read_vec

- [`read_vol()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_vol.md)
  : Load an image volume from a file

- [`read_image()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_image.md)
  : read_image

- [`write_elements()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/write_elements-methods.md)
  : Write a sequence of elements from an input source

- [`write_vec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/write_vec-methods.md)
  : Write a 4d image vector to disk

- [`write_vol()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/write_vol-methods.md)
  : Write a 3d image volume to disk

- [`close(`*`<BinaryReader>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/close-methods.md)
  [`close(`*`<BinaryWriter>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/close-methods.md)
  : Close a BinaryReader or BinaryWriter

- [`ColumnReader()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/ColumnReader.md)
  : Create Column Reader Object

- [`header_file()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/header_file-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to get the name of the header file, given a file name
  and a `FileFormat` instance.

- [`header_file_matches()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/header_file_matches-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to test whether a file name conforms to the given
  `FileFormat` instance. Will test for match to header file only

- [`read_columns()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_columns-methods.md)
  :

  Read a set of column vector from an input source (e.g. `ColumnReader`)

- [`read_header()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_header.md)
  : read header information of an image file

- [`read_meta_info()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_meta_info-methods.md)
  : Generic function to read image meta info given a file

- [`read_vol_list()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_vol_list.md)
  : read_vol_list

- [`read_hyper_vec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_hyper_vec.md)
  : Read a 5D image as a NeuroHyperVec

## NIfTI Extensions

Classes and functions for working with NIfTI header extensions

- [`NiftiExtension()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/NiftiExtension.md)
  : Create a NIfTI Extension
- [`NiftiExtensionCodes`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/NiftiExtensionCodes.md)
  : Known NIfTI Extension Codes
- [`ecode_name()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/ecode_name.md)
  : Get Extension Code Name
- [`extensions()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extensions.md)
  : Get Extensions from an Object
- [`parse_extension()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/parse_extension.md)
  : Parse NIfTI Extension Data
- [`parse_afni_extension()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/parse_afni_extension.md)
  : Parse AFNI Extension
- [`get_afni_attribute()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/get_afni_attribute.md)
  : Get AFNI Attribute from Extension
- [`list_afni_attributes()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/list_afni_attributes.md)
  : List AFNI Attributes in Extension

  [`` `[`( ``*`<ClusteredNeuroVec>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extractor4d.md)
  : Array-like access for 4-dimensional data structures

- [`dim(`*`<ClusteredNeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim-methods.md)
  [`dim(`*`<FileMetaInfo>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim-methods.md)
  [`dim(`*`<NeuroObj>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim-methods.md)
  [`dim(`*`<NeuroHyperVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim-methods.md)
  [`dim(`*`<NeuroSpace>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim-methods.md)
  [`dim(`*`<ROIVol>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim-methods.md)
  [`dim(`*`<ROICoords>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim-methods.md)
  : Get Dimensions of FileMetaInfo Object

- [`dim_of()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/dim_of-methods.md)
  : Get the length of a given dimension of an object

- [`drop(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/drop-methods.md)
  : Drop a dimension

- [`drop()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/drop.md) :
  Generic Drop Method

- [`drop_dim()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/drop_dim-methods.md)
  : Drop a Dimension from an Object

- [`length(`*`<ClusteredNeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)
  [`length(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)
  [`length(`*`<NeuroVecSeq>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/length-methods.md)

  : Get length of NeuroVec object

- [`data_file()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/data_file-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to get the name of the data file, given a file name
  and a `FileFormat` instance.

- [`data_file_matches()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/data_file_matches-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to test whether a file name conforms to the given a
  `FileFormat` instance. Will test for match to data file only

- [`data_reader(`*`<NIFTIMetaInfo>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/data_reader-methods.md)
  [`data_reader(`*`<AFNIMetaInfo>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/data_reader-methods.md)
  : Create Data Reader for AFNI Format

- [`downsample()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/downsample-methods.md)
  : Downsample an Image

- [`embed_kernel()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/embed_kernel-methods.md)
  : Generic function to position kernel in a position in image space

- [`extension()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/extension.md)
  : Get Extension by Code

- [`file_matches()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/file_matches-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to test whether a file name conforms to the given
  `FileFormat` instance. Will test for match to either header file or
  data file

- [`grid_to_coord()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/grid_to_coord-methods.md)
  : Generic function to convert N-dimensional grid coordinates to real
  world coordinates

- [`grid_to_grid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/grid_to_grid-methods.md)
  : Generic function to convert voxel coordinates in the reference space
  (LPI) to native array space.

- [`grid_to_index()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/grid_to_index-methods.md)
  : Generic function to convert N-dimensional grid coordinates to 1D
  indices

- [`has_extensions()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/has_extensions.md)
  : Check if Extensions are Present

- [`header()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/header-methods.md)
  : Access NIfTI Header Information

- [`header_file()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/header_file-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to get the name of the header file, given a file name
  and a `FileFormat` instance.

- [`header_file_matches()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/header_file_matches-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to test whether a file name conforms to the given
  `FileFormat` instance. Will test for match to header file only

- [`index_to_coord()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/index_to_coord-methods.md)
  : convert 1d indices to n-dimensional real world coordinates

- [`index_to_grid()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/index_to_grid-methods.md)
  : Convert 1d indices to n-dimensional grid coordinates

  [`linear_access(`*`<DenseNeuroVec>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/linear_access-methods.md)
  [`linear_access(`*`<DenseNeuroVol>`*`,`*`<integer>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/linear_access-methods.md)

  [`linear_access(`*`<FileBackedNeuroVec>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/linear_access-methods.md)
  [`linear_access(`*`<MappedNeuroVec>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/linear_access-methods.md)

  : Linear Access Method for FileBackedNeuroVec

- [`load_data(`*`<MappedNeuroVecSource>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/load_data-methods.md)
  [`load_data(`*`<NeuroVecSource>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/load_data-methods.md)
  [`load_data(`*`<NeuroVolSource>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/load_data-methods.md)
  [`load_data(`*`<SparseNeuroVecSource>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/load_data-methods.md)
  : Load image data from a NeuroVecSource object

- [`lookup(`*`<IndexLookupVol>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/lookup-methods.md)
  [`lookup(`*`<AbstractSparseNeuroVec>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/lookup-methods.md)
  : Lookup Values in an IndexLookupVol Object

- [`mapf()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/map-methods.md)
  : Apply a function to an object.

- [`map_values()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/map_values-methods.md)
  : Map Values from One Set to Another Using a User-supplied Lookup
  Table

- [`mask()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/mask-methods.md)
  : Extract Mask from Neuroimaging Object

- [`matricized_access()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/matricized_access-methods.md)
  : Extract values from a 4D tensor using a matrix of time-space
  indices.

- [`mean(`*`<DenseNeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/mean-methods.md)
  [`mean(`*`<SparseNeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/mean-methods.md)
  [`mean(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/mean-methods.md)
  : Temporal Mean of a NeuroVec

- [`meta_info()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/meta_info.md)
  : Lightweight metadata for neuroimaging files

- [`ndim()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/ndim-methods.md)
  : Extract the number of dimensions of an object

- [`` `!`( ``*`<DenseNeuroVol>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/not-methods.md)
  [`` `!`( ``*`<SparseNeuroVol>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/not-methods.md)
  : Logical Negation for Neuroimaging Volumes

- [`num_clusters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/num_clusters-methods.md)
  : Number of Clusters

- [`origin()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/origin-methods.md)
  : Extract Image Origin

- [`partition()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/partition-methods.md)
  : Partition an image into a set of disjoint clusters

- [`patch_set(`*`<NeuroVol>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/patch_set-methods.md)
  [`patch_set(`*`<NeuroVol>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`,`*`<LogicalNeuroVol>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/patch_set-methods.md)
  : Create a patch set from a NeuroVol object

- [`perm_mat()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/perm_mat-methods.md)
  : Extract permutation matrix associated with an image

- [`read_meta_info()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/read_meta_info-methods.md)
  : Generic function to read image meta info given a file

- [`reorient()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/reorient-methods.md)
  : Remap the grid-to-world coordinates mapping of an image.

- [`resample()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/resample-methods.md)
  : Resample an Image to Match the Space of Another Image

- [`scale_series()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/scale_series-methods.md)
  : Generic functions to scale (center and/or normalize by standard
  deviation) each series of a 4D image That is, if the 4th dimension is
  'time' each series is a 1D time series.

- [`series()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/series-methods.md)
  [`series_roi(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`,`*`<matrix>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/series-methods.md)
  [`series_roi(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`,`*`<ROICoords>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/series-methods.md)
  [`series_roi(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`,`*`<LogicalNeuroVol>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/series-methods.md)
  [`series_roi(`*`<NeuroVec>`*`,`*`<numeric>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/series-methods.md)
  [`series_roi(`*`<NeuroVecSeq>`*`,`*`<matrix>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/series-methods.md)
  : Extract one or more series from object

- [`slice()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/slice-methods.md)
  : Extract image slice

- [`slices()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/slices-methods.md)
  : Extract an ordered series of 2D slices from a 3D or 4D object

- [`space()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/space-methods.md)
  : Extract Geometric Properties of an Image

- [`spacing()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/spacing-methods.md)
  : Extract Voxel Dimensions of an Image

- [`split_blocks()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_blocks-methods.md)
  : Cut a vector-valued object into a list of sub-blocks

- [`split_clusters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_clusters-methods.md)
  : Cut an object into a list of spatial or spatiotemporal clusters

- [`split_fill()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_fill-methods.md)
  : Fill Disjoint Sets of Values with the Output of a Function

- [`split_reduce()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_reduce-methods.md)
  : Summarize Subsets of an Object by Splitting by Row and Applying a
  Summary Function

- [`split_scale()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/split_scale-methods.md)
  : Center and/or Scale Row-subsets of a Matrix or Matrix-like Object

- [`strip_extension()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/strip_extension-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to strip extension from file name, given a
  `FileFormat` instance.

- [`sub_clusters()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/sub_clusters.md)
  : Select a Subset of Clusters

- [`sub_vector()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/sub_vector-methods.md)
  :

  Generic function to extract a sub-vector from a `NeuroVec` object.

- [`summary(`*`<NeuroVol>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/summary-neuro-methods.md)
  [`summary(`*`<DenseNeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/summary-neuro-methods.md)
  [`summary(`*`<SparseNeuroVec>`*`)`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/summary-neuro-methods.md)
  : Summary of Neuroimaging Objects

- [`temporal_access()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/temporal_access-methods.md)
  : Extract full sparse rows across time.

- [`trans()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/trans-methods.md)
  : Extract image coordinate transformation

- [`values()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/values-methods.md)
  : Extract Data Values of an Object

- [`vectors()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/vectors-methods.md)
  : Extract an ordered list of 1D vectors.

- [`vols()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/vols-methods.md)
  : Extract an ordered series of 3D volumes.

- [`voxels()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/voxels-methods.md)
  : extract voxel coordinates

- [`which_dim()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/which_dim-methods.md)
  : Find Dimensions of a Given Axis

- [`write_elements()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/write_elements-methods.md)
  : Write a sequence of elements from an input source

- [`write_vec()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/write_vec-methods.md)
  : Write a 4d image vector to disk

- [`write_vol()`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/write_vol-methods.md)
  : Write a 3d image volume to disk

- [`None`](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/reference/None.md) :
  Pre-defined null axis

# Articles

### Start Here

The shortest path from reading data to understanding space and storage

- [Overview: Getting Started with
  neuroim2](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Overview.md):
- [Choosing a
  Backend](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/ChoosingBackends.md):
- [Coordinate Systems and Spatial
  Transforms](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/coordinate-systems.md):
- [Working with Volumes and
  Vectors](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/VolumesAndVectors.md):
- [Resampling, downsampling, and
  reorientation](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Resampling.md):

### Analysis Workflows

Common analysis patterns built from ROIs, searchlights, and summaries

- [ROIs, Searchlights, and
  Pipelines](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/AnalysisWorkflows.md):
- [Slice visualization with
  neuroim2](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/slice-visualization.md):
- [neuroim2
  Cookbook](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Cookbook.md):

### Spatial Workflows

Focused spatial methods outside the main onboarding path

- [Smoothing and filtering with
  neuroim2](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/Smoothing.md):

### Advanced Topics

Deeper or more specialized articles beyond the main reader path

- [Advanced 3D Volume
  Patterns](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/ImageVolumes.md):
- [Advanced NeuroVec
  Patterns](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/NeuroVector.md):
- [Advanced ROI
  Construction](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/regionOfInterest.md):
- [ClusteredNeuroVec: Parcel-based 4D
  Analysis](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/clustered-neurovec.md):
- [Advanced Split, Map, and
  Reduce](https://bbuchsbaum.github.io/neuroim2/articles/pipelines.md):
